    """A simple class that outputs hello-world."""

    MESSAGE = "hello-world"

    def output(self) -> str:
        """Return the hello-world message."""
        return self.MESSAGE

    def print_message(self) -> None:
        """Print the hello-world message."""
        print(self.output())

    HelloWorld().print_message()
